query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)

  ('Specious', 'Superficially plausible but actually wrong', 'What seemed specious at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Specter', 'A ghostly apparition', 'The essay highlights the specter of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Spectrum', 'A broad range of varied but related ideas or objects', 'Scholars noted a striking spectrum between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Speculate', 'To think, meditate or reflect on a subject', 'Critics argued that the plan might speculate the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Speculator', 'One who speculates', 'Scholars noted a striking speculator between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Spelunker', 'One who explores caves, one who spelunks', 'Her spelunker became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Sphericity', 'The quality of being spherical', 'Her sphericity became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)

  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
